micro_topic: Nuclear Fission And Fusion And Binding Energy
question_text:
The energy released in the fusion of $$2 \mathrm{~kg}$$ of hydrogen deep in the sun is $$E_H$$ and the energy released in the fission of $$2 \mathrm{~kg}$$ of $${ }^{235} \mathrm{U}$$ is $$E_U$$. The ratio $$\frac{E_H}{E_U}$$ is approximately:
(Consider the fusion reaction as $$4_1^1H+2 \mathrm{e}^{-} \rightarrow{ }_2^4 \mathrm{He}+2 v+6 \gamma+26.7 \mathrm{~MeV}$$, energy released in the fission reaction of $${ }^{235} \mathrm{U}$$ is $$200 \mathrm{~MeV}$$ per fission nucleus and $$\mathrm{N}_{\mathrm{A}}= 6.023 \times 10^{23})$$

subject: Physics
question_text: A hydrogen atom in ground state is given an energy of $$10.2 \mathrm{~eV}$$. How many spectral lines will be emitted due to transition of electrons?

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Motion Of Charged Particle Inside Magnetic Field
question_text: A proton and a deutron $$(q=+\mathrm{e}, m=2.0 \mathrm{u})$$ having same kinetic energies enter a region of uniform magnetic field $$\vec{B}$$, moving perpendicular to $$\vec{B}$$. The ratio of the radius $$r_d$$ of deutron path to the radius $$r_p$$ of the proton path is:

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Kinetic Theory Of Gases And Gas Laws
question_text: The temperature of a gas is $$-78^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$$ and the average translational kinetic energy of its molecules is $$\mathrm{K}$$. The temperature at which the average translational kinetic energy of the molecules of the same gas becomes $$2 \mathrm{~K}$$ is :

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Surface Tension Excess Pressure And Capillarity
question_text: The excess pressure inside a soap bubble is thrice the excess pressure inside a second soap bubble. The ratio between the volume of the first and the second bubble is:

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Fluid Flow Bernoullis Principle And Viscosity
question_text:
A spherical ball of radius $$1 \times 10^{-4} \mathrm{~m}$$ and density $$10^5 \mathrm{~kg} / \mathrm{m}^3$$ falls freely under gravity through a distance $$h$$ before entering a tank of water, If after entering in water the velocity of the ball does not change, then the value of $$h$$ is approximately:
(The coefficient of viscosity of water is $$9.8 \times 10^{-6} \mathrm{~N} \mathrm{~s} / \mathrm{m}^2$$)

subject: Physics
question_text: The de-Broglie wavelength associated with a particle of mass $$m$$ and energy $$E$$ is $$h / \sqrt{2 m E}$$. The dimensional formula for Planck's constant is :

subject: Physics
question_text: A square loop of side $$15 \mathrm{~cm}$$ being moved towards right at a constant speed of $$2\mathrm{~cm} / \mathrm{s}$$ as shown in figure. The front edge enters the $$50 \mathrm{~cm}$$ wide magnetic field at $$t=0$$. The value of induced emf in the loop at $$t=10 \mathrm{~s}$$ will be :

subject: Physics
question_text:
A $$1 \mathrm{~kg}$$ mass is suspended from the ceiling by a rope of length $$4 \mathrm{~m}$$. A horizontal force '$$F$$' is applied at the mid point of the rope so that the rope makes an angle of $$45^{\circ}$$ with respect to the vertical axis as shown in figure. The magnitude of $$F$$ is :
(Assume that the system is in equilibrium and $$g=10 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^2$$)

subject: Physics
question_text: The following figure represents two biconvex lenses $$L_1$$ and $$L_2$$ having focal length $$10 \mathrm{~cm}$$ and $$15 \mathrm{~cm}$$ respectively. The distance between $$L_1$$ & $$L_2$$ is :

subject: Physics
question_text: The resultant of two vectors $$\vec{A}$$ and $$\vec{B}$$ is perpendicular to $$\vec{A}$$ and its magnitude is half that of $$\vec{B}$$. The angle between vectors $$\vec{A}$$ and $$\vec{B}$$ is _________$$^\circ$$.

subject: Physics
question_text: An electric field $$\vec{E}=(2 x \hat{i}) N C^{-1}$$ exists in space. A cube of side $$2 \mathrm{~m}$$ is placed in the space as per figure given below. The electric flux through the cube is ______ $$\mathrm{Nm}^2 / \mathrm{C}$$.

subject: Physics
question_text: To determine the resistance (R) of a wire, a circuit is designed below. The $$V$$-$$I$$ characteristic curve for this circuit is plotted for the voltmeter and the ammeter readings as shown in figure. The value of $R$ is _________ $$\Omega$$.

subject: Physics
question_text: A circular disc reaches from top to bottom of an inclined plane of length $$l$$. When it slips down the plane, if takes $$t \mathrm{~s}$$. When it rolls down the plane then it takes $$\left(\frac{\alpha}{2}\right)^{1 / 2} t \mathrm{~s}$$, where $$\alpha$$ is _________.

subject: Physics
question_text: A force $$(3 x^2+2 x-5) \mathrm{N}$$ displaces a body from $$x=2 \mathrm{~m}$$ to $$x=4 \mathrm{~m}$$. Work done by this force is ________ J.

subject: Physics
question_text:
A particle of mass $$0.50 \mathrm{~kg}$$ executes simple harmonic motion under force $$F=-50(\mathrm{Nm}^{-1}) x$$. The time period of oscillation is $$\frac{x}{35} s$$. The value of $$x$$ is _________. 
(Given $$\pi=\frac{22}{7}$$)

subject: Physics
question_text: At room temperature $$(27^{\circ} \mathrm{C})$$, the resistance of a heating element is $$50 \Omega$$. The temperature coefficient of the material is $$2.4 \times 10^{-4}{ }^{\circ} \mathrm{C}^{-1}$$. The temperature of the element, when its resistance is $$62 \Omega$$, is __________$${ }^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$$.

subject: Physics
question_text:
A straight magnetic strip has a magnetic moment of $$44 \mathrm{~Am}^2$$. If the strip is bent in a semicircular shape, its magnetic moment will be ________  $$\mathrm{Am}^2$$.
(given $$\pi=\frac{22}{7}$$)

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Huygens Principle And Interference Of Light
question_text: Monochromatic light of wavelength $$500 \mathrm{~nm}$$ is used in Young's double slit experiment. An interference pattern is obtained on a screen. When one of the slits is covered with a very thin glass plate (refractive index $$=1.5$$), the central maximum is shifted to a position previously occupied by the $$4^{\text {th }}$$ bright fringe. The thickness of the glass-plate is __________ $$\mu \mathrm{m}$$.

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Ac Circuits And Power In Ac Circuits
question_text: A capacitor of reactance $$4 \sqrt{3} \Omega$$ and a resistor of resistance $$4 \Omega$$ are connected in series with an ac source of peak value $$8 \sqrt{2} \mathrm{~V}$$. The power dissipation in the circuit is __________ W.
